The Hustle (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,417,038Details
International Box Office $61,972,530
Worldwide Box Office $97,389,568
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,834,859
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $935,316
Total $2,770,175
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Josephine Chesterfield is a glamorous, seductive Brit with a sprawling home in Beaumont-sur-Mer and a penchant for defrauding gullible wealthy men from all corners of the world. Into her well-ordered, meticulously moneyed world bursts Penny Rust, an Aussie who is as free-form and fun-loving as Josephine is calculated and cunning. Where Penny amasses wads of cash by ripping off her marks in neighborhood bars, Josephine fills her safe with massive diamonds after ensnaring her prey in glitzy casinos. Despite their different methods, both are masters of the art of the fleece so they con the men that have wronged women.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,007,709 (36.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$21,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,007 opening theaters/3,077 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $46,243,208

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 10th, 2019 (Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: May 8th, 2019 (Wide) (Trinidad)
May 8th, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Uruguay)
May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Thailand)
May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: July 30th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 on appeal for crude sexual content and language.
(Rating bulletin 2542 (Cert #51692), 8/29/2018)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Genderbending Casting, Remake
Plot point: Confidence Men, Professional Rivalry
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Pin High, Cave 76 , Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Camp Sugar
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Josephine Chesterfield is a glamorous, seductive Brit with a sprawling home in Beaumont-sur-Mer and a penchant for defrauding gullible wealthy men from all corners of the world. Into her well-ordered, meticulously moneyed world bursts Penny Rust, an Aussie who is as free-form and fun-loving as Josephine is calculated and cunning. Where Penny amasses wads of cash by ripping off her marks in neighborhood bars, Josephine fills her safe with massive diamonds after ensnaring her prey in glitzy casinos. Despite their different methods, both are masters of the art of the fleece so they con the men that have wronged women.
